prompts.title: 奢品香水广告
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Luxury Amber Perfume Ad
prompts.description: 经典奢品广告风格，黑色大理石台面+烟雾效果，适合香水/护肤/美妆类高端产品
prompts.prompt: A luxurious cinematic product photograph of a classic rectangular perfume bottle inspired by {argument name="brand label" default="N°5 CHANEL PARIS PARFUM"}, placed upright on a glossy black marble surface with white veining. The bottle is centered slightly to the right, made of clear faceted glass with a large transparent crystal stopper, filled with rich amber-gold perfume that glows from within. Tiny condensation droplets cover the glass, adding texture and realism. Dramatic warm lighting from the upper left creates golden highlights, deep reflections on the marble, and a soft luminous bloom in the background. Wisps of elegant smoke curl around the bottle on both sides, enhancing a moody high-end advertisement feel. Dark background, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed studio product photography, luxury beauty campaign aesthetic, crisp focus on the bottle, realistic reflections, warm black-and-gold color palette. Add a small white {argument name="corner logo" default="Pollo.ai"} in the top-right corner. Square composition, premium commercial ad, photorealistic, high contrast, refined and sophisticated.
prompts.prompt_zh:
奢品香水广告：  
一幅奢华、电影感十足的产品静物摄影，主体为一款经典矩形香水瓶，设计灵感源自{argument name="brand label" default="N°5 CHANEL PARIS PARFUM"}。香水瓶垂直置于光洁的黑色大理石台面（带白色天然纹路）之上，构图居中略偏右。瓶身为透明刻面玻璃材质，配一枚硕大的透明水晶瓶塞；瓶内盛满浓郁的琥珀金色香水，由内而外透出温润光泽。玻璃表面覆有细微冷凝水珠，增强质感与真实感。左上方投射戏剧性暖光，在瓶身形成金色高光，在大理石台面映出深邃倒影，并于背景中晕染出柔和的发光光斑（luminous bloom）。瓶体左右两侧各萦绕一缕优雅烟雾，强化高端、情绪化（moody）的奢侈品广告氛围。背景为深色，采用浅景深（shallow depth of field），超精细影棚级产品摄影（ultra-detailed studio product photography），呈现奢华美妆广告（luxury beauty campaign）美学风格；焦点精准锁定瓶身，反射效果高度写实，整体采用温暖的黑金（warm black-and-gold）配色方案。右上角添加一枚小巧的白色{argument name="corner logo" default="Pollo.ai"}标识。正方形构图，高端商业广告质感，照片级真实感（photorealistic），高对比度，格调 refined 且 sophisticated（精致而考究）。

prompts.title: 护肤品柔光棚拍
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Skincare Product Studio Shot
prompts.description: 柔和的奶油色调，搭配泡沫和花瓣，适合护肤品/洗护用品的清新展示
prompts.prompt: A soft {argument name="bottle color" default="cream-colored"} bottle with a {argument name="pump color" default="pastel yellow"} pump stands on a matte podium, surrounded by silky foam and {argument name="flowers" default="chamomile blossoms"}. The background is a pale yellow gradient with subtle bubble details. The label emphasizes organic chamomile and calming care. Fresh chamomile flowers accentuate the gentle appeal.
prompts.prompt_zh: 一款柔光{argument name="bottle color" default="cream-colored"}色瓶身，搭配{argument name="pump color" default="pastel yellow"}色泵头，置于哑光质感展台之上，周围环绕丝滑细腻的泡沫及{argument name="flowers" default="chamomile blossoms"}。背景为浅黄色渐变，点缀细腻气泡纹理细节。瓶身标签突出“有机洋甘菊”与“舒缓护理”功效。新鲜洋甘菊花朵进一步强化产品温和亲肤的视觉调性。

prompts.title: 夏日饮料广告海报
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Tropical Citrus Soda Ad Poster
prompts.description: 热带风情饮料广告，沙滩背景+水花+冰块+水果，带完整文案排版
prompts.prompt: Create a vibrant tropical commercial poster for a citrus soda bottle, in a bright summer advertising style. Show a single large plastic bottle of {argument name="product name" default="Soda"} centered slightly to the right, tilted a little left, with a yellow cap and transparent bottle covered in cold condensation droplets, filled with glowing golden-orange soda. The label should feature sliced oranges and citrus artwork with the brand text "{argument name="product name" default="Soda"}", the phrase "aux agrumes d'été", and a small green "500 ml" mark. Use a sunny beach background with vivid blue sky, turquoise ocean, soft clouds, and blurred tropical palm leaves entering from the upper right corner. Add dramatic water splashes around the base of the bottle, scattered clear ice cubes, and 5 visible citrus pieces in the foreground: 2 orange wedges, 1 lime half, 1 grapefruit half, and 1 partial orange slice at the far right edge. Place large French promotional text on the left: a huge white headline "{argument name="headline text" default="Soda"}" with a small splash accent above it, then yellow script text "aux agrumes d'été" underneath. Add a yellow paint-stroke badge at mid-left with the text "LA FRAÎCHEUR QUI PÉTILLE !". Add a vertical feature list on the lower left with 3 round icons and French captions: "SAVEURS NATURELLES", "SANS COLORANTS ARTIFICIELS", and "EXTRA RAFRAÎCHISSANT". Add a green brushstroke banner at the bottom left reading "FORMAT PRATIQUE 500 ml". Add a round beige eco-style seal at the bottom right with green outline and leaf motif, containing the text "{argument name="seal text" default="PLAISIR FRUITÉ À CHAQUE GORGÉE"}". Lighting should be glossy and high-energy with strong sun flare from the upper left, saturated citrus colors, crisp packaging detail, realistic droplets, and polished supermarket-ad realism.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：夏日饮料广告海报

创作一幅充满活力的热带风格商业海报，用于一款柑橘味汽水瓶，采用明亮清爽的夏季广告风格。画面中央略偏右位置展示一支大型塑料瓶装 {argument name="product name" default="Soda"}，瓶身微微向左倾斜；瓶盖为明黄色，瓶体透明，表面覆盖着逼真的冷凝水珠，瓶内盛满泛着微光的金橙色汽水。瓶身标签需呈现切片橙子与柑橘主题插画，并印有品牌名称 "{argument name="product name" default="Soda"}"、法语标语 "aux agrumes d'été"，以及右下角一处小巧的绿色“500 ml”容量标识。

背景为阳光明媚的海滩场景：湛蓝晴空（vivid blue sky）、青绿色海水（turquoise ocean）、柔和蓬松的云朵（soft clouds），以及从画面右上角斜向切入、虚化处理的热带棕榈叶（blurred tropical palm leaves）。瓶底周围添加富有戏剧感的水花飞溅效果（dramatic water splashes），散落若干晶莹剔透的冰块（scattered clear ice cubes）；前景中清晰呈现5枚柑橘类水果切片：2片橙子楔形切片（orange wedges）、1个对半切开的青柠（lime half）、1个对半切开的葡萄柚（grapefruit half），以及1片位于画面最右侧边缘的不完整橙子薄片（partial orange slice）。

左侧区域配置大幅法语促销文案：顶部为超大号白色主标题 "{argument name="headline text" default="Soda"}"，其正上方带有一处水花状装饰元素（splash accent）；主标题下方以明黄色手写体（yellow script text）呈现副标 "aux agrumes d'été"。在画面中左位置添加一枚明黄色油漆笔触风格徽章（yellow paint-stroke badge），内含法语口号："LA FRAÎCHEUR QUI PÉTILLE !"（气泡迸发的清爽感！）

左下区域垂直排布一项功能特性列表（vertical feature list），含3个圆形图标（3 round icons）及对应法语说明文字：  
- "SAVEURS NATURELLES"（天然风味）  
- "SANS COLORANTS ARTIFICIELS"（无人工色素）  
- "EXTRA RAFRAÎCHISSANT"（加倍沁爽）

左下角另设一条绿色画笔笔触风格横幅（green brushstroke banner），印有法语文案："FORMAT PRATIQUE 500 ml"（便捷规格 500 ml）。

右下角添加一枚圆形米褐色环保风格认证印章（round beige eco-style seal），外圈为绿色描边（green outline），内部含叶片图案（leaf motif），印章中央文字为："{argument name="seal text" default="PLAISIR FRUITÉ À CHAQUE GORGÉE"}"（每一口，皆是果香欢愉）。

整体光影风格需呈现高光质感（glossy）与高能量感（high-energy），光源来自左上方并带有强烈阳光眩光（strong sun flare from the upper left）；色彩高度饱和（saturated citrus colors），包装细节锐利清晰（crisp packaging detail），冷凝水珠真实可感（realistic droplets），整体视觉效果兼具超市级广告的真实感与精致度（polished supermarket-ad realism）。

prompts.title: 工业设计展板
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Industrial Design Presentation Sheet
prompts.description: 专业工业设计展示板，3x3网格布局展示产品多角度+材质细节+配色方案
prompts.prompt:
Core Subject: [{argument name="reference" default="use the uploaded image"}, keep the details, typography and structure locked 100%]

Layout & Composition: A {argument name="presentation type" default="professional industrial design presentation sheet"}. The image should be organized into a clean grid system.

Top Row: A 3x3 layout showing top-down flat lay views and close-up macro details of materials.

Middle Section: Three hero shots of the product standing upright in different color ways (Matte Black, Arctic White, and accented variants). The products should be slightly tilted to show depth and form.

Bottom Section: A dynamic "floating" composition featuring two products overlapping at opposing angles to showcase the front and side profiles simultaneously.

Environment & Lighting: Set against a minimalist, neutral studio gray background. Soft top-down lighting with realistic contact shadows. High-end product photography aesthetic.

Style & Finish: Matte textures, clean silhouettes, and sharp edges. Leave designated blank areas on the product surfaces for "Placeholder Branding" and "Graphic Mockups." 4k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 render style, hyper-realistic, clean aesthetic.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：工业设计展板

核心主体：[{argument name="reference" default="use the uploaded image"}，100% 保留原图细节、字体排印（typography）与版式结构]

版式与构图：一张 {argument name="presentation type" default="professional industrial design presentation sheet"}（专业工业设计展板）。图像需采用简洁的网格系统进行组织。

顶部区域：3×3 布局，展示产品俯视平铺（top-down flat lay）视角及材质的微距（macro）特写细节。

中部区域：三张主角级（hero shot）产品立式正面图，分别呈现三种配色方案（哑光黑 Matte Black、北极白 Arctic White 及带装饰色点缀的变体 accented variants）；产品需轻微倾斜，以凸显三维深度与造型轮廓。

底部区域：一组富有动感的“悬浮”（floating）构图，两件产品以相反角度交叠，同步展现产品正视图与侧视图。

环境与布光：置于极简主义、中性灰（studio gray）影棚背景中；采用柔和的自上而下（soft top-down）布光，并呈现真实可信的接触阴影（contact shadows）；整体呈现高端产品摄影（high-end product photography）美学风格。

风格与完成效果：哑光（matte）质感、干净利落的剪影（clean silhouettes）、锐利分明的边缘（sharp edges）；在产品表面预留指定空白区域，用于标注“Placeholder Branding”（占位品牌标识）与“Graphic Mockups”（图形样机）；4K 分辨率，Unreal Engine 5 渲染风格，超写实（hyper-realistic），洁净美学（clean aesthetic）。

prompts.title: 鞋类生活方式拍摄
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Luxury Fur-Lined Loafer Lifestyle Photo
prompts.description: 温暖编辑风格的生活方式产品照，低角度特写，适合鞋类/服饰的场景化展示
prompts.prompt: A warm, editorial-style lifestyle product photo shot indoors from a low close-up angle, focused on a woman's lower legs and feet as she tries on 1 pair of black leather backless loafers with tan faux-fur lining. One loafer is worn on the right foot and the left foot is bare, hovering just above the textured cream shag rug, while the second matching loafer lies on the rug in the lower left foreground. The shoes have smooth black leather uppers, a rounded almond toe, open mule-style heel, plush brown fur spilling out around the opening, and a small polished gold horsebit hardware detail across the vamp. The model wears cropped medium-blue denim jeans with a raw frayed hem. The setting is a cozy minimalist interior with a cream rug featuring 2 thin irregular black lines, a neutral wall, and a leaning rectangular mirror with a medium wood frame in the upper right background, softly reflecting the rug and part of the scene. Use soft natural window light, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, realistic skin texture, muted beige and black palette, relaxed candid composition, premium fashion catalog mood, high detail, photorealistic.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：鞋类生活方式拍摄

一张温暖、具有杂志编辑风格（editorial-style）的生活方式产品静物摄影，室内拍摄，采用低角度近距离特写构图，焦点集中在一位女性的下肢与双脚——她正试穿1双黑色皮革无后跟乐福鞋（black leather backless loafers），鞋内衬为棕褐色仿毛皮（tan faux-fur lining）。其中一只鞋穿在右脚，左脚赤裸，轻悬于肌理感奶油色长绒地毯（textured cream shag rug）上方；另一只同款乐福鞋则置于画面左下前景的地毯上。该鞋款采用顺滑黑色皮革鞋面，杏仁形圆头（rounded almond toe），穆勒式开放式鞋跟（open mule-style heel），柔软棕色毛绒从鞋口自然溢出，鞋面中央饰有小巧抛光金色马衔扣五金细节（polished gold horsebit hardware detail across the vamp）。模特身着中蓝色短款牛仔裤（cropped medium-blue denim jeans），裤脚为未经包边的毛边设计（raw frayed hem）。场景为温馨简约风室内空间：奶油色地毯上带有两条细窄、不规则的黑色线条；中性色调墙面；右上方背景中斜倚一面矩形镜，镜框为中等色调木质（medium wood frame），柔和映出地毯及部分场景。布光采用柔和自然的窗光（soft natural window light），浅景深（shallow depth of field），附带细微胶片颗粒感（subtle film grain），呈现真实肌肤质感（realistic skin texture），整体配色为低饱和度的米 beige 与黑色（muted beige and black palette），构图松弛自然、富有抓拍感（relaxed candid composition），营造高端时尚型录氛围（premium fashion catalog mood），高细节表现，高度写实（photorealistic）。

prompts.title: 香水大理石梳妆台
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Luxury Perfume Ad on Marble Vanity
prompts.description: 奢华梳妆台场景，金色灯光+丝绸+鲜花，带文案排版的完整广告图
prompts.prompt: A luxury e-commerce advertising photo of a premium perfume bottle on a polished gray-and-white marble vanity, shot in a warm cinematic studio style with soft golden lighting, shallow depth of field, and elegant reflections. The composition is square and high-end, with the perfume bottle centered slightly right of frame and promotional text on the left. The bottle is a tall sculpted hourglass-shaped glass flacon with smoky transparent gray glass fading darker at the base, a glossy gold spherical cap, a gold collar engraved with fine branding, and a large metallic gold interlocking monogram on the front. Keep the branding-inspired feel but do not add extra products. In the foreground left, include 1 cut-crystal bowl with a gold rim, partially cropped. In the background right, include 1 brushed gold cylindrical vase holding 1 bouquet of soft white flowers, blurred. Behind the bottle, add 1 black marble rectangular box with subtle white veining and gold trim. In the lower right foreground, include 1 draped piece of champagne-colored satin fabric, softly out of focus. The background should be dark, luxurious, and softly blurred, with rich brown-black tones and a vertical shadowed panel on the left to support typography. Add elegant serif headline text on the upper left reading {argument name="headline text" default="Premium Perfume,"} in large warm beige letters, with a smaller serif subheading beneath reading {argument name="tagline" default="Subtlety and Elegance"}, plus a thin short gold horizontal line below the subheading. Place a small white logo in the top-right corner reading {argument name="brand logo" default="Pollo.ai"}. Emphasize premium materials, realistic glass refraction, gold metallic highlights, luxury product photography, refined composition, soft bokeh, and upscale beauty-ad aesthetics.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：香水大理石梳妆台

一张高端电商广告摄影图：一款顶级香水瓶置于抛光灰白双色大理石梳妆台（vanity）上，采用温暖电影感影棚风格（cinematic studio style）拍摄，配以柔和金色灯光、浅景深（shallow depth of field）及优雅倒影。构图为正方形、高奢质感，香水瓶居中略偏右，促销文案置于画面左侧。瓶身为修长雕塑感沙漏造型玻璃瓶（glass flacon），通体为烟灰色半透明玻璃，底部渐变为更深色调；瓶盖为高光金色球形盖；瓶颈处配金色环状颈圈（gold collar），精细蚀刻品牌标识；瓶身正面印有大型金属金色交织字母标志（interlocking monogram）。整体需保留品牌调性氛围，但不得添加额外产品。

前景左下方：1个切割水晶碗（cut-crystal bowl），镶金边（gold rim），画面中部分裁切（partially cropped）；  
背景右上方：1个拉丝金圆柱形花瓶（brushed gold cylindrical vase），内插一束柔白色花卉（soft white flowers），呈虚化效果；  
瓶身后方：1个黑色大理石矩形盒（black marble rectangular box），带有细腻白色纹理（subtle white veining）与金色包边（gold trim）；  
右下前景：1块香槟色缎面织物（champagne-colored satin fabric），自然垂坠，轻微失焦（softly out of focus）。

背景为深色、奢华、柔和虚化（softly blurred）的暗调空间，主色调为浓郁棕黑色（rich brown-black tones），左侧设一道垂直阴影面板（vertical shadowed panel），专为排版文字（typography）提供视觉支撑。

左上区域添加优雅衬线体（serif）主标题文字，内容为：{argument name="headline text" default="Premium Perfume,"}，以大号暖米色（warm beige）字体呈现；其下方配较小号衬线体副标题（subheading），内容为：{argument name="tagline" default="Subtlety and Elegance"}；副标题下方加一条细短金色横线（thin short gold horizontal line）。  
右上角置小型白色Logo，文字为：{argument name="brand logo" default="Pollo.ai"}。

整体强调：顶级材质表现、真实玻璃折射（realistic glass refraction）、金色金属高光（gold metallic highlights）、高端产品摄影（luxury product photography）、精炼构图（refined composition）、柔美散景（soft bokeh）以及高端美妆广告美学（upscale beauty-ad aesthetics）。

prompts.title: 微缩场景创意广告
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Miniature Diorama Skincare Advertisement
prompts.description: 超写实微缩工厂场景，小人偶围绕巨型产品瓶工作，极具创意的电商主图风格
prompts.prompt: A hyper-realistic miniature diorama product advertisement featuring an oversized luxury skincare pump bottle labeled "LUXEVEIL Skin Science – Radiance Nourishing Body Lotion" in cream/beige with a polished gold pump top, placed on a circular platform. Tiny figurine construction workers dressed in yellow coveralls and white hard hats swarm around the bottle climbing scaffolding, painting the bottle with rollers, operating a tower crane, working near industrial tanks and pipework, and unloading a miniature flatbed truck. The scene includes metal scaffolding structures, industrial silos, orange traffic cones, wooden barricades, and storage barrels. The overall color palette is warm beige, cream, gold, and mustard yellow. Studio photography style with soft diffused lighting, no shadows, clean beige background. The concept metaphorically shows workers "crafting" or "building" the perfect lotion. Tilt-shift miniature aesthetic, ultra-detailed, commercial product photography, 8K resolution, photorealistic CGI render.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：微缩场景创意广告

一个超写实（hyper-realistic）微缩模型（miniature diorama）风格的产品广告，主体为一支巨型奢华护肤泵瓶，瓶身标签清晰印有“LUXEVEIL Skin Science – Radiance Nourishing Body Lotion”字样，主色调为米奶油色（cream/beige），泵头为抛光金色（polished gold），整体置于圆形平台（circular platform）之上。数名微缩人偶造型的建筑工人（tiny figurine construction workers）身穿明黄色工装服（yellow coveralls）与白色安全帽（white hard hats），围绕瓶身忙碌作业：攀爬金属脚手架（scaffolding）、手持滚筒刷为瓶身涂装、操控塔式起重机（tower crane）、在工业储罐（industrial silos）与管道系统（pipework）旁施工，并从一辆微型平板卡车（miniature flatbed truck）上卸货。场景中包含金属脚手架结构、工业筒仓、橙色交通锥（orange traffic cones）、木质路障（wooden barricades）及储存桶（storage barrels）。整体色彩体系为暖调米 beige、奶油色（cream）、金色（gold）与芥末黄（mustard yellow）。采用影棚摄影（studio photography）风格，光线柔和漫射（soft diffused lighting），无阴影（no shadows），背景为纯净米色（clean beige background）。创意概念以隐喻手法表现工人正“精工打造”（crafting）或“构筑”（building）臻美润肤乳。融合移轴镜头（tilt-shift）微缩美学（miniature aesthetic），极致细节（ultra-detailed），商业级产品摄影（commercial product photography），8K分辨率（8K resolution），照片级真实感CGI渲染（photorealistic CGI render）。

prompts.title: 国风瓷器丝巾
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Traditional Chinese Art and Porcelain Vases
prompts.description: 千里江山图丝巾+青花瓷花瓶，东方美学产品展示，适合国风/文创产品
prompts.prompt:
A scarf inspired by 'A Thousand Li of Rivers and Mountains', surrounded by Wang Ximeng's blue-green landscape, with a silky texture and soft lighting.

A famille rose porcelain vase featuring Lady Yang Guifei enjoying flowers, with peony and butterfly patterns in the style of imperial kilns.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：国风瓷器丝巾  

一条受《千里江山图》启发的丝巾，周围环绕王希孟青绿山水画风格的景致，呈现真丝质感（silk texture）与柔光照明（soft lighting）。  

一件粉彩（famille rose） porcelain 瓷瓶，描绘杨贵妃赏花场景，饰有牡丹与蝴蝶纹样，采用清代官窑（imperial kilns）风格。

prompts.title: 电子产品暗调棚拍
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Premium Gaming Motherboard Studio Shot
prompts.description: 高端电子产品暗调摄影，RGB灯效+金属质感细节，适合数码/电竞/硬件产品
prompts.prompt: A high-end enthusiast ATX gaming motherboard product photo on a dark studio background, shown in a three-quarter top-down perspective angled from the lower left toward the upper right. The board is mostly matte black and gunmetal with sharp geometric armor plates, brushed metal textures, and subtle RGB edge lighting in blue, purple, and magenta. Feature an exposed modern Intel-style CPU socket near the upper center, 4 black DIMM memory slots on the right, large VRM heatsinks across the top and upper left, and multiple reinforced PCIe slots in the lower half. Include 3 major branded heatsink zones: a tall rear I/O shroud at upper left with an illuminated RGB eye logo and the text "MAXIMUS HERO", a left-side chipset/slot armor piece with the text "SUPREMEFX", and a large angular lower-right chipset cover with a silver ROG-style emblem plus a lower strip that reads "FOR THOSE WHO DARE". Show detailed capacitors, headers, power connectors, debug display reading "88" at the top right, and a small round start button nearby. Ultra-detailed commercial product photography, crisp focus across the board, realistic reflections on metal, premium luxury tech aesthetic, dramatic low-key lighting, clean black seamless backdrop, no cables, no CPU, no RAM, no other objects.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：电子产品暗调棚拍

一张高端发烧级ATX游戏主板（gaming motherboard）的产品摄影图，置于深色影棚背景（dark studio background）中，采用三分之四俯视视角（three-quarter top-down perspective），镜头角度自画面左下方向右上方倾斜。主板主体以哑光黑（matte black）与枪灰色（gunmetal）为主色调，配以棱角锐利的几何装甲板（sharp geometric armor plates）、拉丝金属质感（brushed metal textures），以及边缘处柔和的RGB灯效——呈蓝色（blue）、紫色（purple）与洋红色（magenta）。主板上可见：位于画面正上方偏中的现代Intel风格裸露CPU插槽（exposed modern Intel-style CPU socket）；右侧4个黑色DIMM内存插槽（black DIMM memory slots）；顶部及左上方大面积VRM散热片（large VRM heatsinks）；下半区域多个加固型PCIe插槽（reinforced PCIe slots）。

图中需清晰呈现三大品牌化散热区（branded heatsink zones）：  
- 左上方高耸的后置I/O挡板（rear I/O shroud），带发光RGB眼形Logo及蚀刻文字“MAXIMUS HERO”；  
- 左侧芯片组/插槽装甲件（chipset/slot armor piece），印有文字“SUPREMEFX”；  
- 右下方大型斜角式芯片组盖板（angular lower-right chipset cover），表面镶嵌银色ROG风格徽标（silver ROG-style emblem），下方条状铭牌刻有“For Those Who Dare”字样。

细节须完整展现：精密电容（detailed capacitors）、各类针脚接口（headers）、供电接口（power connectors）、右上角带数字“88”的调试显示屏（debug display reading "88"），以及其旁一颗小型圆形启动按钮（small round start button）。

图像为超精细商业级产品摄影（ultra-detailed commercial product photography），全板锐利对焦（crisp focus across the board），金属表面呈现真实可信的反射（realistic reflections on metal），整体呈现高端奢华科技美学（premium luxury tech aesthetic），采用戏剧性低调布光（dramatic low-key lighting），背景为洁净纯黑无缝幕布（clean black seamless backdrop），无任何线缆（no cables）、无CPU、无内存条（no RAM）、无其他干扰物件（no other objects）。

prompts.title: 耳机电商信息图
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Earbuds E-commerce Infographic
prompts.description: 带模特的电商信息图，产品特写+数据卖点+模特展示，适合3C数码类目
prompts.prompt:
High-impact e-commerce infographic for "{argument name="product" default="Apple Pods Pro 3"}" wireless earbuds.
Foreground: An extreme close-up of a hand holding an open glossy white wireless earbud charging case toward the camera. Inside the case are two sleek white earbuds with black speaker accents. A small glowing green LED indicator is visible on the front of the case. The hand and case have slight macro-lens depth blur for realism.

Mid-ground: A {argument name="model" default="confident young woman"} with tan skin, brown eyes, and dark hair tied in a messy bun. She has natural makeup with a dewy glow. She is wearing a plain {argument name="clothing" default="yellow athletic t-shirt"} (no logos). One white earbud is in her ear. She is looking directly at the camera with a subtle, confident expression.

Background: Clean soft gray gradient studio backdrop with shallow depth of field. Diagonal rainbow prism lens flares and soft light leaks across the scene. Several blurred floating white earbuds in the background for depth and motion.

Lighting: Soft professional studio lighting with glossy highlights on the product, subtle rim light on the model, high dynamic range.

Typography (modern sans-serif, white):

Top center (behind model): Large bold text “AIRPODS”

Top right: “Apple Pods Pro 3”

Mid-left: “Premium sound and noise cancellation”

Mid-right: Large bold “30” with “hours of battery life”

Bottom-right: Large bold “1” with “year warranty”

Style: Ultra-realistic, commercial product photography, 8k resolution, sharp focus on product case, shallow depth of field, vibrant yet clean color palette, premium advertising aesthetic.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：耳机电商信息图

面向“{argument name="product" default="Apple Pods Pro 3"}”无线耳塞的高冲击力电商信息图（e-commerce infographic）。

前景：一只手以极近距离（extreme close-up）将一个开启的、表面光亮的白色无线耳塞充电盒朝向镜头托起。盒内放置着两只流线型白色耳塞，扬声器部位配有黑色装饰边。充电盒正面可见一颗微小的、发出柔和绿光的LED指示灯。手部与充电盒均采用微距镜头（macro-lens）风格的轻微景深虚化（depth blur），增强真实感。

中景：一位{argument name="model" default="confident young woman"}——肤色为浅褐色（tan skin）、棕色眼睛（brown eyes）、深色头发扎成随意松散的发髻（messy bun）。妆容自然，肌肤呈现水润光泽（dewy glow）。身着一件纯色{argument name="clothing" default="yellow athletic t-shirt"}运动T恤（无任何Logo）。右耳佩戴一只白色耳塞。她直视镜头，神情自信而含蓄。

背景：干净柔和的灰阶渐变（soft gray gradient）影棚背景，采用浅景深（shallow depth of field）；画面中穿插斜向彩虹棱镜光晕（diagonal rainbow prism lens flares）及柔化光斑（soft light leaks）；背景中还漂浮着数只虚化的白色耳塞，营造空间纵深感与动态氛围。

布光：专业影棚柔光（soft professional studio lighting），产品表面呈现高光质感（glossy highlights），人物轮廓带有细腻的边缘光（subtle rim light），整体具备高动态范围（high dynamic range, HDR）。

文字排版（现代无衬线字体，白色）：

顶部居中（位于模特后方）：大号加粗文字 “AIRPODS”

右上角：“Apple Pods Pro 3”

中左位置：“Premium sound and noise cancellation” → “卓越音质与主动降噪”

中右位置：大号加粗数字 “30”，下方配文 “hours of battery life” → “续航长达30小时”

右下角：大号加粗数字 “1”，下方配文 “year warranty” → “享1年保修”

风格：超写实（ultra-realistic）、商业级产品摄影（commercial product photography）、8K分辨率、焦点精准落在充电盒主体上（sharp focus on product case）、浅景深（shallow depth of field）、色彩鲜活且干净（vibrant yet clean color palette）、高端广告美学（premium advertising aesthetic）。

prompts.title: 极简产品广告
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Minimalist Product Ad: PURE CRUNCH
prompts.description: Apple风格极简广告，白色柔光+简洁文案，适合任何产品的高端极简展示
prompts.prompt:
A minimalist product advertisement with a {argument name="product" default="fried chicken bucket"} placed on a clean white podium.

Background: soft gradient ({argument name="background gradient" default="light cream to white"}), clean studio.

Lighting: soft diffused, premium Apple-style.

Typography (center): “{argument name="headline" default="PURE CRUNCH"}”

Small text below: “Nothing extra. Just perfection.”

Style: ultra clean, editorial minimal, high-end branding, 8K.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：极简产品广告

一个极简风格的产品广告，中央摆放一件{argument name="product" default="炸鸡桶"}，置于洁净的白色展台（podium）上。

背景：柔和渐变（{argument name="background gradient" default="浅米色至白色"}），干净的专业影棚（studio）环境。

布光：柔和漫射光（soft diffused lighting），高端苹果风（Apple-style）质感。

版式排版（居中）：主标题“{argument name="headline" default="纯粹酥脆"}”

下方小字：“无需多余。唯有臻美。”

风格：极致洁净（ultra clean）、杂志级极简（editorial minimal）、高端品牌调性（high-end branding）、8K超高清。

prompts.title: 通用产品棚拍模板
prompts.description: 万能产品棚拍模板，浅灰渐变背景+专业灯光，只需替换产品名即可使用
prompts.prompt: Create a premium product studio image of a [PRODUCT] for [BRAND], designed in line with [BRAND REFERENCE]. Show the [PRODUCT] floating against a clean light gray to soft white gradient background with a minimal high-end tech aesthetic. The [PRODUCT] should feel sleek, modern, refined, and premium, with subtle illuminated accents in [LIGHTING COLOR]. Use a three-quarter front angle so both earcups are visible, with detailed industrial design elements. Include the [BRAND] name cleanly on the product. Lighting should be soft, controlled, and editorial, with crisp highlights, soft shadows, and a subtle colored rim light or glow in [LIGHTING COLOR]. Emphasize material realism and clean geometric forms. Keep the background uncluttered and minimal. No extra props, no people, no text overlays, no packaging, and no distracting elements. Focus entirely on the [PRODUCT] as the hero product.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：通用产品棚拍模板

为[BRAND]品牌创建一张高端产品影棚图像，主体为[PRODUCT]，设计风格需契合[BRAND REFERENCE]。呈现[PRODUCT]悬浮于干净的浅灰至柔白渐变背景之上，整体呈现极简、高端科技感（high-end tech aesthetic）。[PRODUCT]应呈现出流畅、现代、精致且高端的视觉感受，并带有[LIGHTING COLOR]色的微妙照明高光（subtle illuminated accents）。采用三分之四正面视角（three-quarter front angle），确保左右耳罩（earcups）均清晰可见，并充分展现精细的工业设计细节（detailed industrial design elements）。在产品本体上干净利落地呈现[BRAND]品牌名称。布光需柔和、精准、具有杂志级（editorial）质感——高光锐利（crisp highlights）、阴影柔和（soft shadows），并辅以[LIGHTING COLOR]色的细微轮廓光（rim light）或辉光（glow）。重点强调材质真实感（material realism）与简洁的几何造型（clean geometric forms）。背景须保持无杂乱、极简（uncluttered and minimal）。禁止添加额外道具（no extra props）、人物（no people）、文字叠加（no text overlays）、包装（no packaging）及任何干扰性元素（no distracting elements）。画面焦点须完全集中于[PRODUCT]本身，使其作为绝对主角（hero product）呈现。

prompts.title: 环保服饰广告
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Sustainable T-Shirt Plantable Tag Ad
prompts.description: 环保时尚广告风格，绿植墙+木衣架+可种植标签，适合环保/有机品牌
prompts.prompt: A premium eco-conscious fashion advertisement, shot as a refined editorial product photo. A single off-white or natural cream crew-neck T-shirt hangs on a smooth wooden hanger with a black metal hook, placed against a lush wall of dense green leaves and climbing vines. The hanger has a small minimalist brand monogram engraved near the neck. The shirt is shown from the upper torso down to part of the hem, slightly angled, with soft natural folds and high-quality cotton texture. Printed inside the collar is a minimalist brand mark and the text "JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS". Hanging from the neckline is 1 rectangular recycled-paper seed tag tied with rustic brown twine; the tag reads "Tulsi" and "Plantable Seed Tag" with a tiny sprouting seed detail near the bottom. From the tag, 1 real tulsi plant stem grows upward across the front of the shirt, with several fresh green leaves, visually demonstrating that the tag is plantable. Add a small fine-label annotation near the tag reading "TULSI PLANTABLE SEED TAG". On the right side, large elegant white serif typography says {argument name="headline text" default="Plant it."}. Beneath it, place 3 stacked lines of narrow uppercase sans-serif copy: "WEAR IT.", "PLANT IT.", and "GROW WITH IT.". At the lower left, add the brand name in spaced uppercase serif text: {argument name="brand name" default="JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS"}, with a thin horizontal line above it. At the lower right, add 3 lines of small uppercase sans-serif text: "FSC® CERTIFIED PACKAGING.", "ZERO SYNTHETIC FIBRE", and "BACKED BY ZERODHA.". Use soft diffused daylight, shallow depth of field, moody green-and-cream color grading, luxury sustainable-brand aesthetics, clean composition, vertical poster layout, subtle shadows, and a calm organic atmosphere. Keep the design minimal, premium, and photorealistic, with the shirt occupying the left half and the typography balanced on the right.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：环保服饰广告

一幅高端、注重生态意识的时尚广告图，以精致杂志风格（editorial）的产品摄影方式呈现。一件偏米白或天然奶油色的圆领T恤，悬挂在光滑木质衣架上（衣架配黑色金属挂钩），衣架置于一面郁郁葱葱的深绿色叶片与攀缘藤蔓构成的背景墙前。衣架颈部附近镌刻一枚极简风格的品牌单字母徽标（monogram）。T恤呈上半身至部分下摆的视角，略微倾斜构图，呈现柔和自然的垂坠褶皱与高品质棉质纹理。衣领内侧印有极简品牌标识及文字：“JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS”。从领口垂下一枚长方形再生纸种子标签（recycled-paper seed tag），以质朴的棕褐色麻绳系挂；标签上印有“Tulsi”及“Plantable Seed Tag”字样，底部附一枚微缩的萌芽种子细节图案。自该标签延伸出一株真实的圣罗勒（tulsi）植物枝条，向上斜跨T恤正面，枝条上生有数片鲜嫩翠绿的叶片，直观体现该标签可种植特性。在标签旁添加一处精细的小型标注文字：“TULSI PLANTABLE SEED TAG”。画面右侧以大型优雅白色衬线体（serif）排布主标题文字：{argument name="headline text" default="Plant it."}。其下方以窄版无衬线体（sans-serif）、全大写字母、三行纵向堆叠形式排列副文案：“WEAR IT.”、“PLANT IT.”、“GROW WITH IT.”。左下角以字间距拉开的全大写衬线体（serif）呈现品牌名称：{argument name="brand name" default="JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS"}，其上方加一条细横线。右下角以小号全大写无衬线体（sans-serif）分三行排布：“FSC® CERTIFIED PACKAGING.”、“ZERO SYNTHETIC FIBRE”、“BACKED BY ZERODHA.”。采用柔和漫射日光（soft diffused daylight）、浅景深（shallow depth of field）、情绪化青绿色与奶油色调色（moody green-and-cream color grading）、奢华可持续品牌美学（luxury sustainable-brand aesthetics）、简洁构图（clean composition）、竖版海报布局（vertical poster layout）、微妙阴影（subtle shadows）及宁静有机氛围（calm organic atmosphere）。整体设计须保持极简、高端与照片级真实感（photorealistic）：T恤占据画面左半部，右侧 typography 布局均衡。

prompts.title: 香水毛皮质感特写
prompts.title_en: Editorial Perfume Bottle in Golden Fur
prompts.description: 编辑级香水特写，产品嵌入金色毛皮中，温暖奢华的时尚杂志风格
prompts.prompt: A luxurious editorial product photograph of a single perfume bottle nestled into dense, plush faux fur in rich golden caramel and honey-brown tones. Center the composition on one clear oval glass bottle filled with warm amber liquid, with a glossy rounded black cap and a clean white rectangular label. The label text should read {argument name="brand name" default="BYREDO"} at the top, {argument name="product name" default="BAL D’AFRIQUE"} large in the middle, and {argument name="product type" default="EAU DE PARFUM"} in small text near the bottom. Shoot it as a close-up still life with soft studio lighting, subtle highlights on the glass and cap, gentle shadows in the folds of the fur, and a warm cinematic color palette. The bottle should sit slightly embedded in the fur so the surrounding texture frames it from all sides, creating a premium fashion editorial mood, minimal composition, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the label, and a high-end beauty campaign aesthetic.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：香水毛皮质感特写

一张奢华的时尚杂志（editorial）风格产品静物摄影：一支香水瓶静卧于浓密厚实的仿毛皮（faux fur）之中，毛皮呈现浓郁的金焦糖色（golden caramel）与蜜棕色（honey-brown）。画面中心构图聚焦于一支透明椭圆形玻璃瓶，瓶内盛装暖调琥珀色液体；瓶盖为光亮圆润的黑色；瓶身贴有一张干净纯白的矩形标签。标签文字排布如下：顶部为{argument name="brand name" default="BYREDO"}，居中大幅显示{argument name="product name" default="BAL D’AFRIQUE"}，底部靠近边缘以小号字体标注{argument name="product type" default="EAU DE PARFUM"}。采用近距离静物（close-up still life）拍摄，搭配柔和的影棚灯光（soft studio lighting），玻璃瓶体与瓶盖呈现细腻高光（subtle highlights），毛皮褶皱间投下轻柔阴影（gentle shadows），整体采用温暖电影感（cinematic）色调。香水瓶略微嵌入毛皮之中，使周围毛皮纹理从四面环绕 framing 瓶身，营造高端时尚杂志（premium fashion editorial）氛围；构图极简（minimal composition）；浅景深（shallow depth of field）；标签文字清晰锐利对焦（crisp focus on the label）；整体呈现高端美妆广告（high-end beauty campaign）美学风格。

prompts.title: 香水苔藓自然风
prompts.description: 产品放在浮木上，绿苔前景+琥珀暖光，自然大地色系的高端产品摄影
prompts.prompt: A high-end editorial product photograph of a single luxury perfume bottle centered in a warm earthy still-life scene. The product is a clear rectangular glass bottle filled with golden amber liquid, topped with a glossy rounded black cap, with a clean white front label that reads "BYREDO", "BAL D’AFRIQUE", and "EAU DE PARFUM". Place the bottle upright on 1 curved piece of pale weathered driftwood, surrounded by a dense carpet of 1 layer of rich green moss covering the foreground and lower frame. Use a minimal studio composition with the product isolated against a smooth warm brown-to-amber gradient background, softly illuminated like sunset light. Light the scene with dramatic directional warm light from the upper right, creating a bright glow on the background, a crisp highlight on the cap, soft reflections in the glass, and gentle shadows across the wood and moss. Keep the framing vertical, the bottle centered slightly low in the composition with generous negative space above, and the overall mood natural, luxurious, earthy, cinematic, and polished like a premium fragrance campaign shot.
prompts.prompt_zh: 高端时尚杂志风格产品摄影：一支奢华香水瓶居中置于温暖质朴的静物场景中。主体为一支透明矩形玻璃瓶，内装金琥珀色液体，瓶顶配有一枚光亮圆润的黑色瓶盖，正面标签简洁纯白，印有“BYREDO”、“BAL D’AFRIQUE”及“EAU DE PARFUM”。将香水瓶垂直立于1段弯曲的浅色风化浮木之上，周围铺满1层浓密饱满的翠绿色苔藓，覆盖画面前景及下部画框区域。采用极简影棚构图，产品孤立呈现于平滑的暖棕至琥珀色渐变背景前，光线模拟日落时分的柔和漫射光（sunset light）。以右上方投射的戏剧性定向暖光（dramatic directional warm light）布光：背景呈现明亮辉光，瓶盖形成清晰高光（crisp highlight），玻璃表面映出柔和反光（soft reflections），浮木与苔藓上投下细腻自然的阴影（gentle shadows）。画面采用竖构图（vertical framing），香水瓶居中但略偏画面下方，上方保留充裕负空间（generous negative space）；整体氛围需呈现自然感、奢华感、大地感（earthy）、电影感（cinematic）与高度精致感（polished），堪比顶级香氛品牌广告大片（premium fragrance campaign shot）。

prompts.title: 9宫格TVC分镜脚本
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - 9-Panel Product TVC Storyboard
prompts.description: 将产品照片转化为9格TVC分镜板，带中文场景标题和时间标注，专业广告导演风格
prompts.prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the single casual product photo into a polished e-commerce TVC storyboard board for a {argument name="video duration" default="15-second"} ad in a {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"} vertical format, presented as a 9-panel grid. Keep the same blue-and-white ceramic ashtray as the product base, but restage it across cinematic advertising shots with warm premium lighting, shallow depth of field, and a refined lifestyle desktop environment. Add a dark storyboard layout with Chinese titles and timing for each panel. Include exactly 9 scenes: 1) environment-establishing wide shot with desk, books, window, and the product placed in context; 2) hero product medium shot on the table; 3) extreme close-up of the blue floral craftsmanship pattern; 4) use case showing a hand placing a cigarette into the ashtray with visible smoke; 5) top-down capacity display showing multiple cigarette butts inside; 6) cleaning scene under running water in a sink with a hand holding the product; 7) bottom-detail close-up showing the underside and anti-slip pads; 8) mood/lifestyle scene at night with the product on a desk, smoke rising, and ambient lamp light; 9) brand closing frame with the product as the hero plus Chinese marketing text. Add the overall header text “产品TVC分镜脚本(15秒 / 9:16竖屏 / 9宫格)” and a product subtitle naming it {argument name="product name" default="青花瓷烟灰缸"}. Give each of the 9 panels a Chinese scene title and timestamp, plus small descriptive Chinese copy beneath each image in the style of a professional commercial shot list. Use premium, realistic commercial photography throughout, consistent product identity, elegant Chinese aesthetic, and a clean high-end storyboard presentation.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：9宫格TVC分镜脚本

基于提供的参考图像，将单张日常风格的产品照片，转化为一套专业级电商TVC分镜脚本（storyboard board），用于一支{argument name="video duration" default="15-second"}时长、{argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"}竖屏比例的广告，以9宫格（3×3）网格形式呈现。产品主体保持原蓝色白底陶瓷烟灰缸不变，但需重新构图，融入电影感广告镜头语言：采用暖调高级布光（warm premium lighting）、浅景深（shallow depth of field），并置于精致的生活化桌面场景（refined lifestyle desktop environment）中。整体分镜板采用深色背景布局，每格配中文场景标题与精确时间码（timing）。严格包含以下9个镜头：

1）环境建立镜头（广角）：展现整张书桌、书籍、窗外自然光及产品在真实生活语境中的摆放；  
2）主角产品中景：烟灰缸居中置于桌面，构图经典、质感突出；  
3）极致特写镜头：聚焦蓝色青花花卉纹样（blue floral craftsmanship pattern）的精细手绘工艺与釉面质感；  
4）使用场景镜头：一只手将香烟置入烟灰缸，烟雾清晰可见，强调功能与氛围；  
5）俯拍容量展示：自上而下视角，呈现烟灰缸内已容纳多支烟蒂，体现实用容量；  
6）清洁场景：产品置于水槽中，水流冲刷，一只手稳持烟灰缸，表现易洁特性；  
7）底部细节特写：低角度近距离拍摄产品底面，清晰展现防滑垫（anti-slip pads）结构与工艺；  
8）情绪/生活方式夜景：夜间桌面场景，烟灰缸静置，一缕轻烟袅袅上升，环境台灯光晕柔和弥漫（ambient lamp light）；  
9）品牌收尾帧：产品作为视觉焦点居中，叠加中文营销文案，强化品牌识别。

全局页眉文字为：“产品TVC分镜脚本(15秒 / 9:16竖屏 / 9宫格)”；  
产品副标题为：{argument name="product name" default="青花瓷烟灰缸"}。

为全部9个分镜格分别添加中文场景标题与对应时间码（如“00:00–00:01”），并在每幅图像下方配一行小型中文描述性文案（descriptive Chinese copy），风格须符合专业商业广告分镜表（commercial shot list）规范。全片采用高端写实商业摄影（premium, realistic commercial photography）风格，确保产品形象统一连贯（consistent product identity）、整体呈现东方雅韵（elegant Chinese aesthetic），分镜板设计简洁、高端、信息清晰（clean high-end storyboard presentation）。

prompts.title: 食品英雄图+分镜
prompts.title_en: Burger hero image plus 9-cell ad storyboard
prompts.description: 分两步生成：先出产品英雄图（无文字纯食品摄影），再出9格广告分镜板
prompts.prompt:
Prompt 1: Create a cinematic hero image of a gourmet cheeseburger on a dark stone surface with glossy brioche bun, melted cheese, crisp lettuce, tomato, grilled patty, sauce, realistic texture, appetizing steam, warm side light, shallow depth of field, premium food commercial style, no text/logos/watermark.

Prompt 2: Create a 9-cell hybrid keyframe-to-transition storyboard sheet for a 15-second gourmet burger ad, moving from empty surface to ingredient assembly to final macro hero shot. Use large S cells and smaller T cells, motion arrows, ghosted ingredient positions, steam, sauce trails, and camera push-in icons. Style: premium food commercial, warm lighting, rich texture, appetizing, cinematic, minimal labels only. No logos, no watermark.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：食品英雄图+分镜  

Prompt 1：创作一幅电影级（cinematic）美食英雄图（hero image），主体为一款高端 gourmet 汉堡，置于深色石材台面之上；汉堡需呈现闪亮光泽的布里欧修（brioche）面包胚、融化的奶酪、清脆生菜、新鲜番茄片、炭烤牛肉饼、酱汁；强调真实细腻的材质质感（realistic texture）、诱人升腾的热气（appetizing steam）、温暖的侧向布光（warm side light）、浅景深（shallow depth of field）；整体风格为高端食品商业广告（premium food commercial style）；画面中不得出现文字、品牌标识（logos）或水印（watermark）。

Prompt 2：为一支15秒的高端汉堡广告（gourmet burger ad）制作一张9格混合式关键帧—转场分镜表（hybrid keyframe-to-transition storyboard sheet），时间线依次呈现：空台面 → 各食材逐一组装过程 → 最终特写级英雄镜头（macro hero shot）。构图采用大型S格（主关键帧，S = “Shot”）与小型T格（转场细节，T = “Transition”）组合；需包含动态箭头（motion arrows）、食材半透明定位轮廓（ghosted ingredient positions）、升腾热气（steam）、酱汁流动轨迹（sauce trails）及镜头推进图标（camera push-in icons）。视觉风格为高端食品商业风（premium food commercial），搭配暖色调布光（warm lighting）、丰富材质表现（rich texture）、强食欲感（appetizing）、电影级质感（cinematic），仅保留极简必要标注（minimal labels only）；严禁出现任何品牌标识（logos）或水印（watermark）。

prompts.description: 赛车风格奢侈手表广告，暗调+红色光线+光面倒影地面，高端产品广告模板
prompts.prompt: A dramatic luxury product advertising image for a motorsport-inspired chronograph wristwatch in a dark studio. Center-left foreground, show a single stainless steel chronograph watch standing upright at a slight three-quarter angle, with a black dial, two red-accent subdials, slim silver hour markers, a tachymeter bezel, and visible crown and pushers on the right side. The watch has a black leather strap with bold red stitching along both edges and a sporty premium finish. To the right of the watch, place one black square presentation box slightly behind it, textured like leather, with red stitching around the lid and a silver embossed eye-shaped logo above the text “NESS STUDIO” and smaller red text “TRACK SURFACE.” At the top center of the composition, add the same silver eye logo with the words “NESS STUDIO” and smaller “BY NICOLAS.” Across the background, place one oversized blurred word, {argument name="headline text" default="PRECISION"}, in large gray capital letters spanning nearly the full width. The scene is set against a deep black background with cinematic red and white horizontal light streaks crossing behind the products from left to right, suggesting speed and racetrack energy. Use a glossy wet ground plane with reflective texture, catching red highlights and mirrorlike reflections beneath the watch and box. At the bottom center, add the text “CHRONOGRAPH SERIES” in clean white spaced capitals with thin red horizontal lines extending on both sides, and below it smaller red capitals reading {argument name="tagline text" default="ALSACE MADE"}. Color palette: black, charcoal gray, silver steel, vivid racing red, and a touch of white. Lighting should be high-contrast and premium, with crisp specular highlights on the metal case, subtle soft fill on the box, and moody shadows. Overall style: ultra-polished commercial product photography, luxury watch campaign, sharp focus on the products, sleek branding, high-end automotive aesthetic.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：奢侈手表广告

一幅戏剧感十足的奢侈品广告图像，主题为一款灵感源自赛车运动的计时码表（chronograph）腕表，拍摄于暗调影棚环境中。画面中心偏左的前景中，呈现一枚单独的不锈钢材质计时码表，直立摆放，呈略微三分之四角度（three-quarter angle）；表盘为黑色，配有两个红色点缀的副表盘（subdials），纤细的银色时标（hour markers），测速圈（tachymeter bezel），右侧可见表冠（crown）与计时按钮（pushers）。表带为黑色皮革材质，两侧边缘饰以醒目的红色缝线，整体呈现动感且高端的精工质感。  
在腕表右侧，放置一个黑色方形展示盒（presentation box），位置略靠后，表面纹理模拟皮革质感，盒盖边缘以红色缝线装饰，盖面中央上方压印一枚银色眼形（eye-shaped）Logo，并标有银色文字“NESS STUDIO”，其下方为较小字号的红色文字“TRACK SURFACE”。  
画面正上方中央位置，添加同一款银色眼形Logo，并配文“NESS STUDIO”，其下方以更小字号呈现红色文字“BY NICOLAS”。  
背景中横向铺展一个超大尺寸、高度虚化（oversized blurred）的单词：{argument name="headline text" default="PRECISION"}，以大号灰色大写字母呈现，横向跨度几乎覆盖整个画幅宽度。  
整体场景置于深邃纯黑（deep black）背景前，背景中穿插数道电影感（cinematic）的横向红白光束（red and white horizontal light streaks），自左向右掠过产品后方，隐喻速度感与赛道能量（racetrack energy）。  
地面采用高光润泽（glossy wet）质感平面，具备镜面反射（mirrorlike reflections）特性，可清晰映出腕表与表盒的倒影，并捕捉到鲜明的红色高光（red highlights）。  
画面底部中央添加文字“CHRONOGRAPH SERIES”，使用干净利落的白色无衬线大写字母（spaced capitals），字间距均匀，其上下两侧延伸出细长的红色水平线（thin red horizontal lines）；该文字正下方以更小字号的红色大写字母呈现：{argument name="tagline text" default="ALSACE MADE"}。  
色彩体系（Color palette）：黑色、炭灰（charcoal gray）、银色不锈钢（silver steel）、鲜活赛车红（vivid racing red），以及少量白色。  
布光要求高对比度（high-contrast）且具高级感（premium）：金属表壳需呈现锐利清晰的镜面高光（crisp specular highlights），展示盒表面采用柔和微妙的补光（subtle soft fill），整体阴影富有情绪张力（moody shadows）。  
整体风格：极致精修的商业级产品摄影（ultra-polished commercial product photography），高端腕表广告大片（luxury watch campaign），产品主体全程锐焦（sharp focus on the products），品牌视觉简洁锋利（sleek branding），融合顶级汽车工业美学（high-end automotive aesthetic）。

prompts.title: 运动品牌霓虹海报
prompts.description: Nike风格运动广告，霓虹灯光+动态跳跃模特+巨大品牌字体，高能量运动美学
prompts.prompt: A high-energy vertical Nike fashion campaign poster featuring a single athletic young woman mid-jump against a futuristic neon studio background. She is captured in a dynamic airborne pose with one knee bent up, the other leg folded back, one arm extended outward and the other bent near her chest, conveying motion and power. Her face is obscured by a clean rectangular blur block centered over the face. She wears a cropped iridescent white hooded windbreaker with a black zipper and small Nike logo on the chest, holographic metallic lavender-blue leggings with a subtle Nike swoosh on the thigh, a black branded waistband visible above the leggings, and white chunky Nike sneakers. Her brown hair is tied in a high ponytail flying outward with the jump. Behind her, enormous glowing white serif letters spell “NIKE” across the upper half, with a small white Nike swoosh centered above the word. Across the middle background, the phrase “LUMINA” appears once in wide bold glowing letters with a horizontal glitch and scanline distortion effect, partially obscured by the model. The color palette is saturated magenta, violet, cyan, and electric blue with strong bloom, glossy highlights, lens flares, and chromatic aberration. Add sweeping circular light trails wrapping around the model’s legs and body, suggesting speed and motion. The overall style is premium sportswear advertising, ultra-polished, cinematic, high contrast, hyperreal retouching, crisp product detail, dramatic rim lighting, and a luminous holographic aesthetic. Place 2 small text lines at the bottom: bottom left reads {argument name="tagline text" default="LIGHT. MOTION. ENERGY."}, bottom right reads {argument name="collection name" default="NIKE LUMINA COLLECTION"} followed by a small Nike swoosh. Include exactly 3 visible Nike swooshes total: 1 above the large NIKE headline, 1 on the jacket chest, and 1 on the leggings.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：运动品牌霓虹海报  

一张高能量竖版耐克（Nike）时尚广告海报，主体为一位年轻健美女性，正腾空跃起，背景为未来感十足的霓虹摄影棚。她以充满张力的空中动态姿态被捕捉：一膝上抬、另一腿向后折叠，一臂向外伸展、另一臂屈于胸前，整体传达出强烈的运动感与力量感。其面部被一块干净的矩形模糊遮罩（clean rectangular blur block）居中覆盖。  
她身穿一件短款虹彩白色连帽防风夹克，配黑色拉链，胸前印有小型耐克（Nike）标志；下身着全息金属质感的淡紫蓝色紧身裤（holographic metallic lavender-blue leggings），大腿外侧带有微妙的耐克勾形标志（Nike swoosh）；裤腰上方可见一条黑色品牌腰带（branded waistband）；脚穿白色厚底耐克运动鞋（white chunky Nike sneakers）。她的棕色长发扎成高马尾，在跃起瞬间向后飞扬。  

背景中，巨大的发光白色衬线体（serif）字母“NIKE”横跨画面顶部区域；一个小型白色耐克勾形标志（Nike swoosh）精准居中置于该单词正上方。画面中段背景处，“LUMINA”一词以宽幅粗体发光字体呈现一次，并叠加水平方向故障效果（horizontal glitch）与扫描线失真（scanline distortion），部分被模特身体遮挡。  

整体色调饱和度极高，主色为洋红（magenta）、紫罗兰（violet）、青色（cyan）与电光蓝（electric blue），并强化辉光（bloom）、镜面高光（glossy highlights）、镜头眩光（lens flares）及色差畸变（chromatic aberration）。在模特腿部与躯干周围添加环绕式弧形光迹（sweeping circular light trails），强化速度与动感表现。  

整体风格为高端运动服饰广告（premium sportswear advertising），极致精修（ultra-polished）、电影级质感（cinematic）、高对比度（high contrast）、超写实润饰（hyperreal retouching）、产品细节锐利清晰（crisp product detail）、戏剧性轮廓光（dramatic rim lighting），以及明亮全息（luminous holographic）视觉美学。  

画面底部添加两行小字号文字：  
- 左下角文字为：{argument name="tagline text" default="LIGHT. MOTION. ENERGY."}  
- 右下角文字为：{argument name="collection name" default="NIKE LUMINA COLLECTION"}，其后紧跟一个小型耐克勾形标志（Nike swoosh）。  

画面中须**严格呈现恰好3个可见的耐克勾形标志（Nike swoosh）**：  
1. 位于顶部巨型“NIKE”标题正上方的1个；  
2. 位于夹克胸前的1个；  
3. 位于紧身裤大腿外侧的1个。

prompts.title: 街头潮鞋海报
prompts.description: 街头风潮鞋广告，涂鸦+撕纸+模特低角度pose，复古街头潮牌美学
prompts.prompt: Create a bold streetwear poster advertisement for {argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"} featuring a young adult model seated casually on the ground in a low-angle fashion pose, one knee raised and one leg extended toward the camera so the sneaker in front appears oversized and dominant. The model wears a dark brown oversized leather bomber jacket, a black shirt, light blue loose-fit jeans, white socks, and chunky black-white-gray sneakers with a red accent in the sole and the {argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"} logo visible on the shoe side and tongue. The face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block centered over the face. Use an off-white textured paper background with distressed grunge design elements and collage layering. Behind the model, place a large rough red paint brushstroke shape spanning diagonally across the center. Add black ink splatters, sketch circles, torn paper scraps, and hand-painted graffiti accents. Include 4 major graphic doodles: a large black X in the upper right, a hand-drawn upward arrow in the lower left, a rough crown sketch in the lower right, and a circular scribble near the top center. In the upper left, place a stylized eye logo above the text "{argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"}" and a smaller tagline below reading "A MOMENT OF YOUR STYLE". On the left middle area, add the handwritten slogan "INNOVATE CREATE INSPIRE" in stacked black brush lettering. On the right middle area, place a torn black paper patch with the handwritten white slogan "BUILT DIFFERENT MOVE DIFFERENT" and a red underline stroke. In the lower left near the shoe, add a black distressed label sticker containing a globe scribble, the text "{argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"}", and a barcode. Along the bottom footer, create a clean horizontal strip with 3 social media icons and handles separated by thin vertical dividers: Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter, each followed by "@NESS.STUDIO". The overall style should be edgy, urban, youthful, high-contrast, editorial street fashion, mixing product advertising photography with graffiti poster design, collage textures, and dynamic branding.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：街头潮鞋海报

为{argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"}创作一幅大胆鲜明的街头服饰（streetwear）海报广告：一位年轻成年模特以低角度时尚姿势随意坐于地面，单膝抬起、另一条腿朝向镜头伸展，使前景中的运动鞋呈现夸张放大的视觉效果，成为画面主导焦点。模特身穿深棕色 oversized 皮质飞行员夹克（leather bomber jacket）、黑色上衣、浅蓝色宽松牛仔裤（loose-fit jeans）、白色袜子，以及一双厚底黑白灰配色运动鞋——鞋底带有红色点缀，且鞋侧（side）与鞋舌（tongue）清晰可见{argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"}品牌标识。模特面部被居中放置的柔和矩形模糊块（soft rectangular blur block）刻意遮挡。

背景采用米白色肌理纸（off-white textured paper），叠加做旧颓废风（distressed grunge）设计元素与拼贴分层（collage layering）。模特后方，以粗犷笔触绘制一道大型红色油漆刷痕（rough red paint brushstroke），呈对角线贯穿画面中央。添加黑色墨点飞溅（black ink splatters）、手绘圆圈（sketch circles）、撕裂纸片（torn paper scraps）及手绘涂鸦（hand-painted graffiti）装饰细节。

画面中嵌入4个核心图形涂鸦（graphic doodles）：  
- 右上角为一个大型黑色“X”；  
- 左下角为一支手绘向上的箭头（upward arrow）；  
- 右下角为一枚粗粝风格的王冠草图（rough crown sketch）；  
- 画面上方中央附近为一个圆形潦草涂写（circular scribble）。

左上角区域：置于文字“{argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"}”上方，放置一枚风格化眼睛标志（stylized eye logo）；其下方配有一行较小标语：“A MOMENT OF YOUR STYLE”。

画面中左区域：以堆叠式黑色刷写体（stacked black brush lettering）手写呈现标语“INNOVATE CREATE INSPIRE”。

画面中右区域：粘贴一块撕裂质感黑色纸片（torn black paper patch），其上以手写白字呈现标语“BUILT DIFFERENT MOVE DIFFERENT”，并配一条红色下划线（red underline stroke）。

画面左下角、靠近运动鞋处：添加一枚黑色做旧标签贴纸（black distressed label sticker），内含一个地球潦草简笔（globe scribble）、文字“{argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"}”，以及一条条形码（barcode）。

底部页脚（bottom footer）：设计一条干净的横向条带，内含3个社交媒体图标及账号名，以细垂直分割线（thin vertical dividers）隔开——依次为 Instagram、Facebook 和 Twitter，每个图标后均标注“@NESS.STUDIO”。

整体风格需兼具锋利感（edgy）、都市感（urban）、青春活力（youthful）、高对比度（high-contrast），融合高端杂志级街头时尚摄影（editorial street fashion）、产品广告摄影（product advertising photography）、涂鸦海报设计（graffiti poster design）、拼贴肌理（collage textures）与动态品牌表达（dynamic branding）。

prompts.title: 时尚卫衣概念广告
prompts.description: 巨大卫衣+模特的超现实比例对比，90年代奢华街头风，概念时装广告
prompts.prompt: A clean editorial fashion advertisement poster on a pale powder-blue studio background with a glossy reflective floor. The composition is vertical and minimal, dominated by oversized bold white condensed sans-serif typography in the background reading “OSAKA SIX:” on the top line and “006 REMAINS” below, filling most of the upper half behind the subject. In the top right corner, small white branding text reads “Designed by ARTTEESHOW.” Centered in the lower middle is an oversized forest-green crewneck sweatshirt standing upright like a sculptural object, with soft heavy cotton fabric, dropped shoulders, extra-long sleeves pooled on the floor, and a small black neck label that reads ARTTEESHOW. On the chest of the sweatshirt is a large abstract collage print made from torn paper fragments in beige, tan, black, gray, white, and vivid red, arranged vertically like layered scraps. Leaning against the right side of the giant sweatshirt is a slim female fashion model with long straight black hair, wearing a matching {argument name="sweatshirt color" default="forest green"} sweatshirt and relaxed wide-leg sweatpants with clean white low-top sneakers. She is posed in profile with a calm detached editorial attitude, one hand in her pocket, her body reclining diagonally against the giant garment, legs extended forward; her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur for an anonymous art-fashion look. The smaller worn sweatshirt has the same abstract torn-paper collage graphic centered on the chest. At the bottom center, add 2 lines of small white copy text: “Made for comfort, worn for confidence.” and “Because life feels better when someone’s carrying the weight of the world.” The image should feel like a premium conceptual streetwear campaign from the early 1990s reimagined as contemporary luxury advertising, with crisp studio lighting, soft shadows, subtle floor reflections, precise product focus, surreal scale contrast between the oversized sweatshirt and the model, and a polished magazine-poster aesthetic.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：时尚卫衣概念广告

一张干净利落的杂志风格（editorial）时尚广告海报，背景为浅粉蓝色（pale powder-blue）影棚纯色背景，地面为高光反射材质（glossy reflective floor）。构图呈垂直竖版、极简主义（minimal），画面主体由背景中巨大的加粗白色压缩无衬线字体（oversized bold white condensed sans-serif typography）构成：顶部一行显示“OSAKA SIX:”，其正下方为“006 REMAINS”，文字占据画面上半部分大部分区域，并位于主体人物后方。右上角以小号白色品牌文字标注：“Designed by ARTTEESHOW”。

画面正中央偏下位置，一件超大号森林绿色（forest-green）圆领卫衣（crewneck sweatshirt）直立摆放，形如雕塑装置（sculptural object）；面料为柔软厚重的棉质（soft heavy cotton fabric），肩线自然下垂（dropped shoulders），袖长极度加长，袖口堆叠于地面（extra-long sleeves pooled on the floor）；领口内侧缝有一枚小巧黑色洗标（small black neck label），印有“ARTTEESHOW”字样。卫衣胸前印有一幅大型抽象拼贴图案（large abstract collage print），由撕裂纸片（torn paper fragments）构成，色彩包括米 beige、棕 tan、黑 black、灰 gray、白 white 及明艳红色 vivid red，碎片纵向层叠排列（arranged vertically like layered scraps）。

一件巨型卫衣右侧倚靠着一位纤瘦女性时尚模特（slim female fashion model），她留着长直黑发（long straight black hair），身穿同色系 {argument name="sweatshirt color" default="forest green"} 卫衣及宽松阔腿运动裤（relaxed wide-leg sweatpants），脚踩纯白低帮小白鞋（clean white low-top sneakers）。模特以侧脸姿态（profile）呈现，神情冷静疏离（calm detached editorial attitude），一手插在裤袋中，身体沿对角线方向斜倚于巨型卫衣之上，双腿向前伸展；面部采用柔和矩形模糊（soft rectangular blur）处理，营造匿名化艺术时尚（anonymous art-fashion look）效果。她所穿的常规尺码卫衣（smaller worn sweatshirt）胸前亦以居中方式呈现完全相同的抽象撕纸拼贴图形（same abstract torn-paper collage graphic centered on the chest）。

画面底部中央添加两行小号白色文案（small white copy text）：  
第一行：“Made for comfort, worn for confidence.”  
第二行：“Because life feels better when someone’s carrying the weight of the world.”

整张图像应呈现出一种高端概念化街头服饰（premium conceptual streetwear）广告气质——灵感源自20世纪90年代初（early 1990s），但以当代奢侈广告（contemporary luxury advertising）语言重新演绎：影棚灯光锐利清晰（crisp studio lighting），阴影柔和（soft shadows），地面反射细腻微妙（subtle floor reflections），产品细节精准聚焦（precise product focus），巨型卫衣与真人模特之间形成超现实尺度对比（surreal scale contrast），整体视觉兼具精致画报感与海报级质感（polished magazine-poster aesthetic）。

prompts.title: 奢华巧克力品牌广告
prompts.description: 虚构奢华巧克力品牌广告系统，多口味变体+编辑级摄影+极简奢华排版
prompts.prompt: Create a premium, square (1:1) product advertisement for a fictional luxury chocolate brand called Noirvelle Chocolat, inspired by high-end chocolate brands. The ad should feel like a high-end editorial campaign, combining luxury food photography, refined packaging design, and cinematic lighting. Use matte black wrapper, subtle gold foil, elegant serif typography, and realistic product rendering. Generate flavor variants such as Blood Orange Noir, Salted Pistachio Muse, and Raspberry Ember with distinct mood, color palette, ingredients, headline, and supporting copy. Keep the chocolate bar as hero centerpiece with subtle reflections, shallow depth of field, luxury minimalism, and a small CTA: “Shop the drop.”
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：奢华巧克力品牌广告

为虚构的高端巧克力品牌“Noirvelle Chocolat（诺瓦尔巧克力）”创作一幅高级感十足的正方形（1:1）产品广告，该品牌灵感源自顶级巧克力品牌。广告需呈现高端杂志（high-end editorial）风格的视觉叙事，融合奢华食品摄影（luxury food photography）、精致包装设计（refined packaging design）与电影级布光（cinematic lighting）。采用哑光黑色（matte black）外包装、细腻烫金（subtle gold foil）、优雅衬线体（elegant serif）字体，以及高度逼真的产品渲染（realistic product rendering）。设计三种风味变体：  
- “血橙 Noir（Blood Orange Noir）”  
- “海盐开心果缪斯（Salted Pistachio Muse）”  
- “覆盆子余烬（Raspberry Ember）”  

每种风味需具备独立的情绪氛围（mood）、专属配色方案（color palette）、核心原料（ingredients）、主标题（headline）及辅助文案（supporting copy）。巧克力条须作为画面绝对主角（hero centerpiece），呈现微妙反光（subtle reflections）、浅景深（shallow depth of field）、极简主义奢华感（luxury minimalism），并添加小型行动号召（CTA）：“Shop the drop.”（立即选购本季新品）

prompts.title: 果汁广告海报
prompts.description: 城市风果汁广告，模特+巨大果汁瓶强制透视+品牌排版+卖点图标
prompts.prompt: Create a premium modern beverage advertisement poster in a vertical 3:4 format featuring a stylish young female model crouching confidently in a bright urban indoor hallway with colorful graffiti wall art on one side and clean minimal architecture on the other. In the foreground, a giant realistic fruit juice bottle is held toward the camera in forced perspective, with fictional branding like “VIVAJUICE”. Add brand logo, tagline, huge bold overlapping typography, four icon-based feature badges, and three smaller bottle variants at bottom right. Use soft natural lighting mixed with commercial studio polish, realistic shadows, shallow depth of field, glossy floor reflections, and a premium energetic eCommerce campaign aesthetic.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：果汁广告海报

创建一张高端现代饮品广告海报，采用竖版3:4比例构图：画面主体为一位时尚年轻的女性模特，自信地蹲踞于明亮的城市室内走廊中，一侧是色彩缤纷的涂鸦墙艺术（graffiti wall art），另一侧则是简洁极简主义风格的建筑结构（clean minimal architecture）。前景中，一个巨型写实风格水果果汁瓶以强制透视（forced perspective）方式朝向镜头呈现，瓶身印有虚构品牌名“VIVAJUICE”。画面需包含品牌Logo、宣传标语（tagline）、巨大粗体且相互重叠的排版文字（huge bold overlapping typography）、四个基于图标的特性徽章（four icon-based feature badges），以及右下角排列的三款较小尺寸的同系列瓶装变体（three smaller bottle variants）。整体采用柔和自然光与商业影棚级精修光影（commercial studio polish）相结合的布光方式，呈现真实阴影（realistic shadows）、浅景深（shallow depth of field）、高光质感地板反射（glossy floor reflections），并营造出高端活力型电商营销活动（premium energetic eCommerce campaign）的视觉美学风格。

prompts.title: 珠宝微缩城市广告
prompts.description: 钻石项链变成微缩城市纪念碑，超现实奢华广告风格，适合珠宝/奢侈品
prompts.prompt: Create a hyper-detailed luxury advertising poster in a cinematic miniature-world style. A gigantic royal diamond necklace with intricate gold filigree and massive ruby gemstones stands in the center like an architectural monument. Surround the necklace with a futuristic miniature city built around and inside the jewelry piece, including skyscrapers, elevated highways, bridges, spiral staircases, tiny human figures, luxury billboards, drones, helicopters, and cinematic urban activity. Use a deep crimson red monochrome background with gold and ruby accents. Add premium fashion-ad aesthetics, ultra-realistic textures, glossy reflections, dramatic studio lighting, depth of field, tilt-shift miniature effect, and high-end commercial composition. Include bold elegant typography at the top saying: "EMBRACE THE EXTRAORDINARY". Style inspired by luxury jewelry campaigns, surreal city-building concepts, and premium 3D advertising renders. Ultra realistic, 8K, octane render, sharp focus, highly detailed, cinematic shadows, symmetrical composition.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：珠宝微缩城市广告

创作一张超精细、奢华风格的广告海报，采用电影级微缩世界（miniature-world）视觉风格。画面中央矗立一条巨型皇家钻石项链，其以繁复精美的黄金镂空雕花（gold filigree）打造，并镶嵌硕大的红宝石（ruby gemstones），宛如一座建筑纪念碑。围绕该项链构建一座未来主义风格的微缩城市——城市结构延展并嵌入珠宝本体之中，包含摩天大楼、高架高速公路、桥梁、螺旋楼梯、微小的人类人偶、高端奢侈品广告牌、无人机、直升机，以及富有电影感的城市动态场景。背景采用深绯红色（crimson red）单色基调，辅以金色与红宝石色点缀。整体呈现高级时装广告（fashion-ad）美学：纹理极致真实（ultra-realistic textures）、表面具备高光镜面反射（glossy reflections）、影棚级戏剧化布光（dramatic studio lighting）、浅景深（shallow depth of field）、移轴微缩效果（tilt-shift miniature effect），以及高端商业级构图（high-end commercial composition）。画面顶部配以醒目而优雅的粗体排版文字：“EMBRACE THE EXTRAORDINARY”（拥抱非凡）。视觉风格灵感源自顶级珠宝品牌广告大片、超现实城市建构概念（surreal city-building concepts）及高端3D广告渲染（premium 3D advertising renders）。最终效果需达到：超写实（ultra realistic）、8K分辨率、Octane渲染器输出（octane render）、焦点锐利（sharp focus）、细节极度丰富（highly detailed）、电影级阴影（cinematic shadows）、对称式构图（symmetrical composition）。

prompts.title: 双色饮料广告
prompts.description: 西瓜粉+青柠绿对角分色背景，两杯饮品对称构图，完整排版+价格+配色代码
prompts.prompt:
Create a premium modern beverage promotional poster for We Drink.

TOPIC:

Watermelon Pink + Lime Green Refresh Campaign

STYLE & ART DIRECTION:
Modern energetic beverage advertising
Youthful commercial branding
Split-color background composition
Bright refreshing summer aesthetic
Minimal dynamic layout
High-contrast drink advertisement style
Instagram-ready beverage promotion
Premium fast-moving commercial design

MAIN SUBJECT:

Two large ultra-realistic cold beverages positioned prominently in the center.

Drink 1:

A vibrant watermelon pink drink in a transparent plastic cup with visible ice cubes, condensation droplets, and a fresh watermelon garnish.

Drink 2:

A bright lime green drink in a matching transparent cup with visible ice cubes, condensation droplets, and a lime slice garnish.

Additional elements:

Floating ice cubes around the composition
Dynamic water splash effects
Soft realistic shadows beneath each cup
Premium glossy liquid textures
Tiny fruit slices suspended in motion

LAYOUT & COMPOSITION:
Diagonal split-color background
Left side: watermelon pink gradient
Right side: lime green gradient
Large bold headline at the top center: "SIP THE FRESHNESS"
Two hero drinks centered prominently
Product descriptions placed beside each cup
Promotional price section near the bottom-left
We Drink logo and small branding elements at the bottom
Floating ice cubes and splash effects around the drinks
Spacious modern commercial hierarchy

TEXT & TYPOGRAPHY:
Bold oversized sans-serif typography
Youthful rounded commercial fonts
White typography accents
Supporting text: "Watermelon Burst" and "Lime Rush"
Promotional price: Only $3.99
Tagline: "Freshness in Every Sip"

DEPTH & LIGHTING:
Soft glossy studio lighting
Bright refreshing reflections
Realistic beverage highlights
Floating commercial depth
Soft ambient shadows
Premium condensation texture lighting

EXTRA DESIGN DETAILS:
Floating ice cubes
Water splash particles
Glossy gradients
Modern promotional badges
Fruit slices and droplets
Minimal energetic decorative elements

COLOR PALETTE:
Watermelon Pink (#FF4F87)
Lime Green (#A8FF2A)
White typography
Soft transparent highlights

QUALITY:

Ultra-realistic beverage photography, premium advertising composition, Behance-quality commercial poster, high-resolution, sharp focus, photorealistic textures, professional brand campaign aesthetic.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：双色饮料广告  

为“We Drink”品牌创作一张高端现代饮品宣传海报。

主题：  
西瓜粉红（Watermelon Pink）+ 青柠绿（Lime Green）焕新畅饮活动  

风格与艺术指导：  
现代活力型饮品广告（Modern energetic beverage advertising）  
面向青年群体的商业品牌形象（Youthful commercial branding）  
双色分割背景构图（Split-color background composition）  
明亮清爽的夏日美学（Bright refreshing summer aesthetic）  
极简动态版式（Minimal dynamic layout）  
高对比度饮品广告风格（High-contrast drink advertisement style）  
适配Instagram传播的饮品推广视觉（Instagram-ready beverage promotion）  
高端快消品类商业设计（Premium fast-moving commercial design）  

主体内容：  
两张超写实、冰镇感强烈的大型饮品，居中醒目呈现。  

饮品1：  
一杯明艳的西瓜粉红饮品，盛装于透明塑料杯中，清晰可见冰块、杯壁凝结水珠（condensation droplets），并以新鲜西瓜片作装饰。  

饮品2：  
一杯鲜亮的青柠绿饮品，盛装于同系列透明杯中，同样可见冰块、凝结水珠（condensation droplets），并以一片青柠切片作装饰。  

附加元素：  
环绕构图漂浮的独立冰块（Floating ice cubes）  
动态水花飞溅效果（Dynamic water splash effects）  
每只杯子下方投射出柔和真实的阴影（Soft realistic shadows）  
高端光泽质感的液体表面（Premium glossy liquid textures）  
微小水果切片悬浮于运动轨迹中（Tiny fruit slices suspended in motion）  

版式与构图：  
对角线分割色块背景（Diagonal split-color background）  
左侧：西瓜粉红渐变（watermelon pink gradient）  
右侧：青柠绿渐变（lime green gradient）  
顶部中央设置大幅加粗主标题：“SIP THE FRESHNESS”（啜饮鲜活）  
两大主角饮品居中突出呈现  
产品描述文字分别置于对应杯体旁侧  
促销价格信息置于左下区域  
“We Drink”品牌Logo及小型品牌标识置于底部  
饮品周围分布漂浮冰块与水花效果  
留白充足、层级清晰的现代商业视觉逻辑（Spacious modern commercial hierarchy）  

文字与字体设计：  
粗壮超大号无衬线字体（Bold oversized sans-serif typography）  
年轻化圆润商业字体（Youthful rounded commercial fonts）  
纯白色文字强调（White typography accents）  
辅助文案：“Watermelon Burst”（西瓜爆汁）与“Lime Rush”（青柠奔涌）  
促销价：“仅售 $3.99”（Only $3.99）  
标语：“每一口，皆新鲜”（Freshness in Every Sip）  

空间深度与布光：  
柔光质感影棚照明（Soft glossy studio lighting）  
明亮清爽的反射光效（Bright refreshing reflections）  
逼真的饮品高光表现（Realistic beverage highlights）  
营造悬浮式商业纵深感（Floating commercial depth）  
柔和环境阴影（Soft ambient shadows）  
凸显凝结水珠质感的专业布光（Premium condensation texture lighting）  

额外设计细节：  
漂浮冰块（Floating ice cubes）  
水花微粒（Water splash particles）  
光泽渐变（Glossy gradients）  
现代感促销徽章（Modern promotional badges）  
水果切片与水滴（Fruit slices and droplets）  
极简而富有动感的装饰元素（Minimal energetic decorative elements）  

色彩方案：  
西瓜粉红（#FF4F87）  
青柠绿（#A8FF2A）  
纯白文字（White typography）  
柔和透明高光（Soft transparent highlights）  

画质要求：  
超写实饮品摄影（Ultra-realistic beverage photography）  
高端广告级构图（Premium advertising composition）  
Behance水准商业海报（Behance-quality commercial poster）  
高分辨率（high-resolution）  
锐利焦点（sharp focus）  
照片级真实材质表现（photorealistic textures）  
专业品牌营销视觉气质（professional brand campaign aesthetic）

prompts.title: 奢华香水人像广告
prompts.description: 将人像照片转为Chanel风格的暗调香水广告，巴黎奢华室内+黑色丝绸+金色灯光
prompts.prompt:
Transform the uploaded portrait into a luxurious cinematic fragrance poster inspired by the dark seductive elegance of a high-fashion perfume campaign. Preserve her exact facial features, warm skin tone, confident expression, wavy brunette hair, and recognizable identity. Style her as a mysterious femme fatale with soft glossy lips, luminous skin, subtle smoky eyes, and an intense captivating gaze.

Dress her in a black satin slip dress with delicate lace trim and a glamorous faux fur wrap slipping off her shoulders. Place her inside a moody Parisian-inspired luxury interior with black reflective walls, gold rim lighting, deep shadows, cinematic contrast, and sensual ambient lighting. Add elegant reflections and depth for a premium editorial look.

Include a sleek black perfume bottle inspired by a luxury noir fragrance aesthetic near the foreground. Use refined minimalist typography in a luxury fashion-ad style with dramatic spacing and premium composition. Add a tagline such as: “She doesn’t follow. She leaves a trace.”

The overall mood should feel seductive, mysterious, powerful, feminine, cinematic, timeless, and ultra-luxurious — like a Chanel Coco Noir campaign directed by a Hollywood cinematographer. High detail, photorealistic skin texture, glossy highlights, rich blacks, warm gold accents, magazine-quality fashion photography, 8K luxury editorial finish.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：奢华香水人像广告  

将上传的人像照片转化为一幅奢华、电影感十足的香水海报，灵感源自高端时尚香水广告所呈现的暗黑诱惑式优雅（dark seductive elegance）。完整保留她精准的面部特征、温暖的肤色、自信的表情、波浪状棕发（wavy brunette hair）以及可辨识的个人身份。将其塑造成一位神秘的致命女郎（femme fatale）：唇部柔润亮泽（soft glossy lips），肌肤通透发光（luminous skin），眼妆为细腻烟熏（subtle smoky eyes），目光强烈而摄人心魄（intense captivating gaze）。

为她搭配一件黑色缎面吊带裙（black satin slip dress），饰以精致蕾丝边（delicate lace trim），外搭一件华美仿毛皮披肩（glamorous faux fur wrap），自然滑落于肩头。将她置于一处情绪浓郁、受巴黎风格启发的奢华室内空间中：墙面为黑色高反射材质（black reflective walls），配以金色边缘照明（gold rim lighting）、深邃阴影（deep shadows）、电影级明暗对比（cinematic contrast）及富有情调的环境光（sensual ambient lighting）。加入优雅的镜面反射（elegant reflections）与空间纵深感（depth），营造高端杂志级（premium editorial）视觉效果。

在画面前景附近添加一支线条利落的黑色香水瓶，设计灵感源自奢华黑色电影风（luxury noir）香水美学。采用精炼极简主义字体（refined minimalist typography），风格契合高端时尚广告（luxury fashion-ad），排版强调戏剧性留白（dramatic spacing）与顶级构图（premium composition）。加入一句标语，例如：“她从不追随——她只留下痕迹。”（“She doesn’t follow. She leaves a trace.”）

整体氛围需传达出诱惑感（seductive）、神秘感（mysterious）、力量感（powerful）、女性气质（feminine）、电影感（cinematic）、永恒感（timeless）与极致奢华感（ultra-luxurious）——宛如香奈儿（Chanel）《Coco Noir》广告大片，由好莱坞电影摄影师（Hollywood cinematographer）掌镜执导。画质要求：超高细节（high detail）、皮肤纹理高度写实（photorealistic skin texture）、亮泽高光（glossy highlights）、饱满浓郁的纯黑（rich blacks）、温暖金色点缀（warm gold accents）、杂志级时尚摄影质感（magazine-quality fashion photography）、8K 级奢华杂志成片效果（8K luxury editorial finish）。

prompts.title: 热带风产品广告模板
prompts.description: 万能产品广告模板：产品英雄图+模特互动+品牌排版，只需替换方括号参数
prompts.prompt: GPT Image 2 Prompt Create a creative commercial advertising poster for [PRODUCT NAME], a [PRODUCT TYPE], inspired by vibrant tropical product campaigns. Place the product as a large hero object on the center-right with realistic glossy reflections, sharp label details, and premium lighting. Add a stylish model sitting beside or slightly in front of the product, naturally interacting with it by [MODEL ACTION]. The model should look [MOOD], wearing [OUTFIT STYLE], and should not cover the product label.
prompts.prompt_zh: GPT Image 2 提示词：为[PRODUCT NAME]（一种[PRODUCT TYPE]）创作一幅富有创意的商业广告海报，灵感源自充满活力的热带风格产品营销活动。将产品作为核心视觉主体（hero object）置于画面中心偏右位置，呈现逼真的高光反射（glossy reflections）、清晰锐利的标签细节（sharp label details）以及高端质感灯光（premium lighting）。在产品旁或略靠前的位置添加一位时尚模特，自然地与产品互动，动作为[MODEL ACTION]。模特神情应呈现[MOOD]状态，身着[OUTFIT STYLE]风格服饰，且不得遮挡产品标签。

prompts.title: 时尚鞋类广告大片
prompts.title_en: E-commerce Main Image - Pastel Blue Crocs Fashion Ad
prompts.description: 超大品牌字体背景+模特+巨型鞋子道具+蓝色球体，超现实时尚广告大片
prompts.prompt: A high-end studio advertising poster for {argument name="brand name" default="crocs"}, in a monochrome pastel blue and white color palette, with a glossy reflective floor and a soft sky-blue backdrop. The background is dominated by the word {argument name="headline text" default="CROCS"} in gigantic bold white condensed sans-serif letters spanning nearly the full height of the image. In the top-right corner, add small white text reading "Designed with ChatGPT". Feature 3 adult women with shoulder-length wavy light brown to dark blonde hair, all wearing loose oversized white long-sleeve tops and flowing white wide-leg pants, styled as minimalist fashion models with relaxed neutral expressions. Their faces are intentionally obscured or blurred. One model reclines against an enormous upright white clog shoe on the left side, one model sits casually on top of a giant white clog on the upper right, and one model lounges on the floor at the lower right, leaning back on one arm while seated partly on a glossy blue sphere. Include 2 oversized white clog shoes as hero props: one standing vertically on the left showing the sole and side profile, and one angled on blue crystalline blocks at center-right showing the upper and toe box. Both clogs are classic foam slip-on style with perforation holes, chunky tread, heel straps, and circular logo rivets. The center-right clog is decorated with exactly 8 visible charms pinned to the upper: a blue-green iridescent round charm, a white daisy with yellow center, a black-and-white round emblem near the strap, a small "CROCS" word charm, a dark flower, a peace-hand sign, an orange smiley face, a white cloud, and an orange flower. Scatter exactly 7 glossy floating or grounded blue spheres of varying sizes around the set: one large sphere behind the left model, one medium sphere floating near center, one medium sphere at bottom left foreground, one medium sphere used as a seat under the lower-right model, one small sphere near the upper left, and 2 additional blue spheres integrated into the composition. Add translucent sculptural gel-like forms at the far left and far right edges, plus angular blue crystal-like rocks beneath the right shoe. At the bottom center, place white promotional copy in a clean sans-serif font: {argument name="tagline line 1" default="Made for comfort, worn for confidence."} on the first line and {argument name="tagline line 2" default="Because life feels better when your feet stop complaining."} on the second line. Beneath that, show 4 minimalist feature icons with labels in white: "ICONIC COMFORT", "LIGHTWEIGHT", "EASY TO CLEAN", and "UNIQUELY YOU". Place the {argument name="logo text" default="crocs"} logo in bold lowercase white at the bottom center with a small trademark symbol. The overall style should feel like a premium surreal fashion campaign, clean editorial lighting, soft shadows, glossy textures, airy composition, and modern lifestyle product advertising.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：时尚鞋类广告大片  

一幅高端影棚风格的广告海报，品牌为{argument name="brand name" default="crocs"}，采用柔和的单色粉蓝色与白色配色方案（monochrome pastel blue and white color palette），地面为高光反射材质（glossy reflective floor），背景为柔雾感天蓝色（soft sky-blue backdrop）。背景中占据主导地位的是巨型粗体白色无衬线压缩字体（gigantic bold white condensed sans-serif letters）呈现的单词{argument name="headline text" default="CROCS"}，其高度几乎贯穿整幅图像。右上角添加小号白色文字：“Designed with ChatGPT”。  

画面中呈现3位成年女性，均留有齐肩波浪发，发色介于浅棕色至深金色之间；身着宽松 oversized 白色长袖上衣与垂坠感强的白色阔腿长裤，整体造型为极简主义时尚模特风格（minimalist fashion models），神情放松、中性淡然；面部刻意虚化或遮蔽（intentionally obscured or blurred）。  

构图安排如下：  
- 左侧：一位模特慵懒倚靠在一只巨型直立式白色洞洞鞋（clog）上；  
- 右上方：一位模特随意坐于另一只巨型白色洞洞鞋顶部；  
- 右下方：一位模特斜倚于地面，单臂支撑身体向后靠，部分身体坐于一颗高光蓝色球体（glossy blue sphere）之上。  

作为核心视觉道具（hero props），呈现两只超大尺寸白色洞洞鞋：  
- 左侧一只垂直竖立，清晰展示鞋底（sole）与侧面轮廓（side profile）；  
- 右侧居中偏右一只以倾斜角度置于蓝色水晶质感块状基座（blue crystalline blocks）上，完整呈现鞋面（upper）与鞋头区域（toe box）。  
两只鞋均为经典泡沫材质一脚蹬款式（classic foam slip-on style），具备透气孔（perforation holes）、厚实防滑鞋底纹路（chunky tread）、可调节后跟带（heel straps）及圆形品牌标识铆钉（circular logo rivets）。  
右侧居中偏右的洞洞鞋鞋面上，精准装饰8枚可见配饰（charms）：一枚蓝绿色虹彩圆形配饰、一朵白瓣黄芯雏菊、一枚靠近后跟带的黑白圆形徽章、一枚小型“CROCS”字样金属字牌、一朵深色花卉、一个和平手势（peace-hand sign）、一枚橙色笑脸（smiley face）、一朵白色云朵、一朵橙色花卉。  

场景中散落共7颗高光蓝色球体（glossy blue spheres），大小不一，分布如下：  
- 一颗大型球体位于左侧模特后方；  
- 一颗中型球体悬浮于画面中央附近；  
- 一颗中型球体置于左下前景；  
- 一颗中型球体作为右下模特的坐具；  
- 一颗小型球体靠近左上方；  
- 另外2颗蓝色球体自然融入整体构图（integrated into the composition）。  

画面最左侧与最右侧边缘添加半透明雕塑感凝胶状形态（translucent sculptural gel-like forms）；右鞋下方布置棱角分明的蓝色水晶质感岩石（angular blue crystal-like rocks）。  

画面底部中央以干净无衬线字体（clean sans-serif font）呈现白色宣传文案：  
第一行：{argument name="tagline line 1" default="Made for comfort, worn for confidence."}  
第二行：{argument name="tagline line 2" default="Because life feels better when your feet stop complaining."}  

其下方排列4枚极简风格功能图标（minimalist feature icons），图标旁配白色标签文字：  
“ICONIC COMFORT”、“LIGHTWEIGHT”、“EASY TO CLEAN”、“UNIQUELY YOU”。  

画面正下方中央位置，以加粗小写白色字体呈现{argument name="logo text" default="crocs"}品牌标识，并附带小型商标符号（trademark symbol）。  

整体视觉风格应体现高端超现实主义时尚广告（premium surreal fashion campaign）：采用干净利落的杂志级布光（clean editorial lighting）、柔和阴影（soft shadows）、高光质感表面（glossy textures）、通透轻盈的构图（airy composition），以及现代生活方式导向的产品广告语感（modern lifestyle product advertising）。

prompts.title: 通用美食摄影模板
prompts.description: 万能美食摄影模板：深色石碗+木板+蒸汽+暖光，替换食物名即可使用
prompts.prompt: Create a square [ASPECT RATIO] premium food photography image of a steaming [FOOD] served in a dark black stone bowl or cast-iron skillet on a wooden board. The dish should look hot, glossy, spicy, and freshly served, with bite-sized pieces of browned protein, dried red chilies, green scallions, white onion, garlic, chili flakes, and visible Sichuan peppercorns coated in a deep red, oily Szechuan sauce. Use a slightly elevated close-up camera angle with shallow depth of field. Make the food the clear hero of the image, centered and richly detailed. Add visible steam rising naturally from the dish. Surround the bowl with subtle restaurant-style props like a dark red tray, scattered dried chilies, peppercorns, a small sauce bowl, or a blurred teapot in the background. Lighting should feel warm, moody, and editorial, like a high-end restaurant food shoot. Emphasize realistic textures and keep the image appetizing, realistic, cinematic, and polished. Avoid text, logos, hands, people, utensils covering the food, cartoon styling, fake plastic textures, excessive symmetry, or an overly clean stock-photo look.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：通用美食摄影模板

创建一幅正方形[ASPECT RATIO]的高端美食摄影图像，主体为一份热气腾腾的[FOOD]，盛装于深黑色石质碗或铸铁煎锅中，并置于木质砧板上。菜肴需呈现滚烫、油亮、辛辣且刚出锅的新鲜质感：其中包含褐化均匀的 Bite-sized 蛋白块（bite-sized pieces of browned protein）、干红辣椒、青葱段、白洋葱丝、蒜片、辣椒碎（chili flakes）以及清晰可见、裹满深红色油润川式酱汁的花椒粒（Sichuan peppercorns）。采用略高于平视的近距离俯拍视角（slightly elevated close-up camera angle），搭配浅景深（shallow depth of field）。确保食物为画面绝对视觉焦点——居中构图，细节丰富、层次饱满。添加自然升腾的可见蒸汽（visible steam rising naturally from the dish）。碗周环境辅以低调的餐厅风格道具，例如深红色托盘、散落的干辣椒与花椒粒、一只小酱碟，或背景中虚化的茶壶（blurred teapot）。布光需营造温暖、氛围感强且具杂志级（editorial）质感的效果，模拟高端餐厅专业美食拍摄风格。重点强化真实可触的材质表现（realistic textures），整体图像须兼具诱人食欲感、高度写实性、电影感（cinematic）与精修完成度（polished）。禁止出现文字、Logo、人手、人物、遮挡食物的餐具、卡通化风格、虚假塑料质感、过度对称构图，或过于干净刻板的商用图库风（overly clean stock-photo look）。

prompts.title: 汉堡英雄海报
prompts.description: 电影级汉堡英雄海报，悬浮拆解+烟熏效果+暗调霓虹色彩分级
prompts.prompt:
A cinematic 9:16 vertical composition featuring a gourmet "Smokey Obsidian" burger.
WHAT: A towering burger with a charcoal brioche bun, thick Wagyu beef patty with visible sear marks, melting aged gruyère dripping like lava, and crispy maple-glazed bacon.
FEEL: An atmosphere of "Urban Indulgence." Dark, moody lighting with a single warm amber spotlight. Wisps of real hickory smoke curl around the bun. The texture is hyper-realistic you can see the salt crystals on the crust and the moisture on the heirloom tomato.
SHOW: The burger is captured in a "deconstructed gravity" moment the top bun is slightly hovering, revealing the internal layers of house-made aioli and pickled red onions.
TYPOGRAPHY: Integration of ultra-bold, distressed sans-serif typeface overlapping the bottom third of the frame. The text reads "DEFY GRAVITY" in a raw, concrete-texture finish.
TECHNICAL: 4k resolution, macro photography style, shallow depth of field, neon-noir color grading (deep blacks, warm ambers, and subtle teal highlights).
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：汉堡英雄海报

一个电影感十足的9:16竖构图，呈现一款高端美食级“烟熏黑曜石”（Smokey Obsidian）汉堡。  
WHAT（主体内容）：一座高耸的汉堡——炭烤布里欧修面包（charcoal brioche bun），厚实的和牛牛肉饼（Wagyu beef patty），表面带有清晰可见的焦化纹路（sear marks）；融化的陈年格鲁耶尔奶酪（aged gruyère）如熔岩般缓缓滴落；外脆内韧的枫糖釉培根（maple-glazed bacon）。  
FEEL（氛围感受）：“都市纵享”（Urban Indulgence）氛围。暗调、情绪化布光，仅有一束温暖琥珀色（warm amber）聚光灯打亮主体；真实山核桃木（hickory）烟雾轻盈缭绕于面包边缘；质感高度拟真（hyper-realistic）——可清晰辨识面包表皮的盐晶颗粒（salt crystals）与传家宝番茄（heirloom tomato）表面沁出的湿润水光。  
SHOW（动态呈现）：采用“解构重力”（deconstructed gravity）瞬间捕捉——上层面包微微悬浮于空中，恰巧揭示内部层次：自制蒜香蛋黄酱（house-made aioli）与腌制红洋葱（pickled red onions）。  
TYPOGRAPHY（字体设计）：超粗体、做旧处理的无衬线字体（ultra-bold, distressed sans-serif）覆盖画面底部三分之一区域；文字内容为“DEFY GRAVITY”，表面呈现粗粝混凝土肌理（raw, concrete-texture finish）。  
TECHNICAL（技术参数）：4K分辨率，微距摄影（macro photography）风格，浅景深（shallow depth of field），霓虹黑色电影风（neon-noir）色彩分级——深邃纯黑（deep blacks）、温暖琥珀色（warm ambers）主调，辅以微妙青蓝色（subtle teal）高光。

提示词标题：健康谷物广告组图  

（抹茶燕麦格兰诺拉广告）  
超写实高端食品广告海报，面向健康早餐格兰诺拉（granola）品牌；画面中心为哑光质感立式自封袋包装，标签清晰印有“Matcha Oat Granola”；整体采用绿色单色美学（green monochrome aesthetic）；俯拍平铺构图（flat lay composition）；柔光影棚灯光（soft studio lighting）；背景为明快鲜活的抹茶绿（vibrant matcha green background）；周围环绕猕猴桃切片、杏仁、燕麦粒、奇亚籽、一碟抹茶粉、盛装格兰诺拉的碗、以及散落的各类原料；版面采用干净现代的字体设计，主标题为“SUPERFOOD MORNING BOWL”；手写风格标注箭头（handwritten annotation arrows）配以健康功效说明文字；强调有机奢华品牌调性（luxury organic branding）；呈现自然投影（natural shadows）；属高端商业食品摄影（high-end commercial food photography）；布局极简却不失细节（minimal yet detailed layout）；构图对称（symmetrical composition）；焦点锐利（sharp focus）；风格契合Instagram信息流广告（Instagram ad style）；8K级超高细节（8k detail）；整体为健康生活方式营销视觉设计（healthy lifestyle marketing design）。  

Prompt : （浆果酸奶脆麦片广告）

prompts.title: 外卖传单设计
prompts.description: 日式中华料理外卖传单，菜单网格+角色插画+优惠券+地图，拟真印刷质感
prompts.prompt:
A Japanese neighborhood Chinese restaurant delivery flyer for mailbox posting (3:4 aspect ratio). Designed to look like a double-sided B5 print.

Flyer characteristics (following the grammar of real delivery flyers):
- Flashy red and yellow color scheme.
- Large text at the top: "Delivery Available! {argument name="shop name" default="Mona-Hanten"}" (shadowed Gothic font).
- An illustration of a {argument name="character" default="Chinese girl in a red cheongsam with a brown short bob"} holding ramen and saying "Welcome!" in a speech bubble.
- A menu photo grid (4x3) featuring various dishes: different types of ramen, fried rice, gyoza, sweet and sour pork, shrimp in chili sauce, mapo tofu, liver and leek stir-fry, tenshinhan, twice-cooked pork, spring rolls, annin tofu, and fried rice sets.
- Names and prices for each dish.
- A large yellow banner saying "Free delivery on all menu items over ¥1,000!".
- "Order by phone! ☎ 072-XX-XXXX" emphasized with a red circle.
- Business hours "11:00-22:00 (Closed on Tuesdays)".
- Delivery area map (simple schematic map).
- Coupon (perforated line for clipping): "One free plate of gyoza with this flyer!".

Texture of cheap paper printing. Includes fold marks. Precision that could be mistaken for a real Japanese delivery flyer.
prompts.prompt_zh:
提示词标题：外卖传单设计

一张面向日本社区的中式餐厅外卖传单（3:4画幅比），专为投递至信箱而设计。整体呈现为双面印刷的B5尺寸（182mm × 257mm）实物效果。

传单特征（严格遵循真实日本外卖传单的视觉语法与排版逻辑）：
- 醒目、高对比度的红黄配色方案（red and yellow color scheme）；
- 顶部大号文字：“支持外卖！{argument name="shop name" default="Mona-Hanten"}”（采用带阴影的哥特体字体 / shadowed Gothic font）；
- 插图：一位{argument name="character" default="身穿红色旗袍、棕色短发波波头的中国少女"}，手捧拉面，气泡对话框中写着“欢迎光临！”（"Welcome!"）；
- 菜单照片网格（4行×3列），展示以下菜品：多种口味拉面、炒饭、煎饺（gyoza）、糖醋里脊、辣子虾（shrimp in chili sauce）、麻婆豆腐（mapo tofu）、猪肝韭菜炒、天津饭（tenshinhan）、回锅肉（twice-cooked pork）、春卷（spring rolls）、杏仁豆腐（annin tofu）、以及炒饭套餐（fried rice sets）；
- 每道菜品均配有清晰菜名与对应价格；
- 一条大型黄色横幅标语：“所有菜单项目满¥1,000即享免费配送！”（"Free delivery on all menu items over ¥1,000!"）；
- “电话订餐！☎ 072-XX-XXXX”字样以醒目的红色圆圈重点突出；
- 营业时间：“11:00–22:00（每周二休业）”；
- 配送范围示意图（简洁示意性地图 / simple schematic map）；
- 优惠券区域（带虚线裁切线 / perforated line for clipping）：“凭本传单可免费获赠一盘煎饺！”（"One free plate of gyoza with this flyer!"）。

纸张质感：廉价复印纸（cheap paper）印刷效果，包含真实折痕（fold marks）。整体精度极高，足以以假乱真，令人误以为是日本本地实际流通的真实外卖传单。
